title: Investigative Journalism
description: Sources, documents, the long timeline, the public-interest test.
summary_pt_br: Jornalismo investigativo: fontes humanas, documentos, linha do tempo, dados, fact-check, interesse público.

scenes.subtitle_en: Sources, documents, the long timeline, the public-interest test.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Jornalismo investigativo: fontes humanas, documentos, linha do tempo, dados, fact-check, interesse público.

scenes.text_en: Sources, documents, the long timeline, the public-interest test. Focus: investigative journalism. Three independent sources corroborate the allegation.
scenes.text_pt: Jornalismo investigativo: fontes humanas, documentos, linha do tempo, dados, fact-check, interesse público. Foco: investigative journalism. Três fontes independentes corroboram a alegação.

scenes.title: Investigative Journalism
scenes.body_en: Five tools: HUMAN SOURCES (on/off record). DOCUMENTS (primary evidence). TIMELINES (the arc). DATA (aggregate patterns). FACT-CHECK every claim. Public-interest test for publication.
scenes.body_pt: Jornalismo investigativo: fontes humanas, documentos, linha do tempo, dados, fact-check, interesse público.

examples.en: Three independent sources corroborate the allegation.
examples.pt: Três fontes independentes corroboram a alegação.

examples.en: The documents date the decision to March 2021.
examples.pt: Os documentos datam a decisão a março de 2021.

examples.en: The public-interest test passes — the story runs Tuesday.
examples.pt: O teste de interesse público passa — matéria sai terça.

exercise.question: Complete: "Three ___ sources corroborate the allegation."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Three independent sources corroborate the allegation."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Três fontes independentes corroboram a alegação.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The documents date the decision to March 2021.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "The documents date the decision to March 2021."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Os documentos datam a decisão a março de 2021.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Investigative Journalism — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre investigative journalism. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, you have one source. What now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Cause and effect need arrows in time.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Does the public gain more than harm?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Fact-check every claim one last time.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Investigative journalism is patience with a deadline.

scenes.title: The investigation
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe five tools used. Use at least three journalism terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the newsroom at midnight, a team of three reporters checked their work against a story that could topple a minister.

paragraphs.speaker: Editor
paragraphs.en: Three independent human sources corroborate the allegation, and none of them have coordinated their testimony.

paragraphs.speaker: Reporter
paragraphs.en: The documents we obtained date the disputed decision to March 2021 — exactly as our second source described it.

paragraphs.speaker: Editor
paragraphs.en: The timeline shows the minister signed the memo six days before the public press conference he later denied attending.

paragraphs.speaker: Reporter
paragraphs.en: The public-interest test passes clearly — the story runs in tomorrow's edition with proper legal review.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Investigative journalism, Kumar believed, is patience with a deadline — the slowest craft in the fastest industry.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Investigative Journalism". Sources, documents, the long timeline, the public-interest test. Three independent sources corroborate the allegation. The documents date the decision to March 2021. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Investigative Journalism". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
